message:
test(runtime): watch daemon one-iteration e2e scaffold (wip)

Adds crates/frankenterm-core/tests/watch_daemon_one_iteration_e2e.rs —
a mock-free integration test for the `ft watch` discovery+persist
loop. Spins up real SQLite via tempfile, drives one iteration of
`PaneRegistry::discovery_tick(Vec<PaneInfo>)` against a 2-pane mock
wezterm, persists via `StorageHandle::upsert_pane`, verifies round-
trip via `get_panes()`, exercises a second-tick close-detection
contract, and asserts graceful `storage.shutdown()`.

Both tests are gated `#[ignore = "e2e wip"]` — the build loop was
interrupted before local verification. Un-ignore once a single
`rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test
watch_daemon_one_iteration_e2e -- --ignored` run is green.

Deliberately avoids editing runtime.rs (pane 6 is working there).
Exercises only already-public APIs the daemon uses in production:
PaneRegistry::{new, discovery_tick, get_entry, entries},
StorageHandle::{new, upsert_pane, get_panes, shutdown},
storage::now_ms.

Domain: watch daemon real-service E2E (pane 5).
